recommendations.title: Alien Abduction: Incident in Lake County
recommendations.overview: After a mysterious blackout, a son goes out to investigate and captures footage of actual aliens. When the aliens follow he and his brothers back to their home all hell breaks lose.

recommendations.title: Zenon: The Zequel

recommendations.overview: Zenon Kar is 15 and lives on a space station which the military has taken over and is dismantling. She receives a mysterious signal and must convince everyone that it's from aliens who have come to help them.

recommendations.overview: Suspected of murdering her best friend, a teenage computer-hacker goes on the run to find the real killer.
